translation.key: {str:Victim} has been muted for {sec:Duration} ({str:Reason})
translation.value: {str:Victim} 被禁言了 {sec:Duration} ({str:Reason})

translation.key: You have already notified that {str:PlayerName} ought to be banned
translation.value: 你已提议封禁 {str:PlayerName}

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} wants {str:VictimName} to be banned ({str:Reason})
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 提议封禁 {str:VictimName} ({str:Reason})

translation.key: You have already voted to change this map
translation.value: 你已投票跳过此地图

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} wants to start the vote '{str:VoteName}'
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 提议开始投票 '{str:VoteName}'

translation.key: White hole found, adjusting scientific parameters...
translation.value: 已获得白洞，正在调整科学参数……

translation.key: You have held a bonus area for one minute, +5 points
translation.value: 你在奖励区域待了一分钟，+5 分

translation.key: You need at least {int:MinHp} HP to revive a zombie
translation.value: 你需要至少 {int:MinHp} 点血量才能治疗一个感染者

translation.key: Too few zombies to revive anyone (less than {int:MinZombies})
translation.value: 不能治疗感染者(感染者数量小于{int:MinZombies}个)

translation.key: Use the laser to upgrade the bomb
translation.value: 用激光升级炸弹

translation.key: Explosive yield: {percent:BombLevel}
translation.value: 爆炸当量： {percent:BombLevel}

translation.key:
The bomb is fully upgraded.
There is nothing to do with the laser.
translation.value:
炸弹已经完全充能。
激光没有用了。

translation.key:
Use the hammer to place a bomb and
then use the laser to upgrade it
translation.value: 使用锤子放置炸弹, 可用激光升级它

translation.key: The turrets are not allowed by the game rules (at least right now).
translation.value: 游戏规则不允许使用炮塔（至少现在是这样）。

translation.key: You have a turret. Use the hammer to place it.
translation.value: 你有一个炮塔。使用锤子放置它。

translation.key: You have {int:NumTurrets} of {int:MaxTurrets} turrets. Use the hammer to place one.
translation.value: 你有 {int:NumTurrets} 个炮塔（最多 {int:MaxTurrets} 个），用锤子放置一个。

translation.key: You don't have a turret to place
translation.value: 你没有炮塔可以放置

translation.key: Laser wall: {sec:RemainingTime}
translation.value: 激光墙︰{sec:RemainingTime}

translation.key: Looper laser wall: {sec:RemainingTime}
translation.value: 环形师激光墙：{sec:RemainingTime}

translation.key: {int:NumBombs} bomb left
translation.other: 炸弹剩余 {int:NumBombs} 个

translation.key: {int:NumBombs} bombs left
translation.other: 炸弹剩余 {int:NumBombs} 个

translation.key: The white hole is available!
translation.value: 白洞已就绪！

translation.key: {int:NumMines} mine is active
translation.other: 地雷已激活 {int:NumMines} 个

translation.key: {int:NumMines} mines are active
translation.other: 地雷已激活 {int:NumMines} 个

translation.key: White hole: {sec:RemainingTime}
translation.value: 白洞：{sec:RemainingTime}

translation.key: Mine activated
translation.value: 地雷已激活

translation.key: Next target in {sec:RemainingTime}
translation.value: {sec:RemainingTime} 后出现下一个目标

translation.key: Target to eliminate: {str:PlayerName}
translation.value: 消除目标︰{str:PlayerName}

translation.key: Position lock: {sec:RemainingTime}
translation.value: 位置锁定：{sec:RemainingTime}

translation.key: Next flag in {sec:RemainingTime}
translation.value: 下一个旗帜出现时间：{sec:RemainingTime}

translation.key: You have eliminated your target, +2 points
translation.value: 你除掉了目标，+2 分

translation.key: Sword velocity increased
translation.value: 剑速度已增加

translation.key: Sword strength increased
translation.value: 剑强度已增加

translation.key: Grenade limit increased
translation.value: 榴弹限量已增加

translation.key: Placed a turret, {int:TurretsNumber} turret left
translation.other: 放置了炮塔，剩余 {int:TurretsNumber} 个

translation.key: Placed a turret, {int:TurretsNumber} turrets left
translation.other: 放置了炮塔，剩余 {int:TurretsNumber} 个

translation.key: The white hole is ready, use the laser rifle to disrupt space-time
translation.value: 白洞已经就绪, 使用激光枪使空间混乱

translation.key: You have {int:NumTurrets} turret available, use the Hammer to place it
translation.other: 你有{int:NumTurrets}个炮塔, 可用锤子放置

translation.key: You have {int:NumTurrets} turrets available, use the Hammer to place it
translation.other: 你有{int:NumTurrets}个炮塔, 可用锤子放置

translation.key: Staying alive for: {int:RemainingTime}
translation.value: 剩余存活时间: {int:RemainingTime}

translation.key: Web mode enabled
translation.value: 网状模式启用

translation.key: Stomach filled by {percent:FodderInStomach}
translation.value: 饱食度：{percent:FodderInStomach}

translation.key: You are sleeping: {sec:EffectDuration}
translation.value: 你陷入了昏睡：{sec:EffectDuration}

translation.key: You are blinded: {sec:EffectDuration}
translation.value: 你失明了：{sec:EffectDuration}

translation.key: Choose your class
translation.value: 选择你的职业

translation.key: Random choice
translation.value: 随机选择

translation.key: The class is disabled
translation.value: 此职业被禁用

translation.key: Need at least {int:MinPlayers} player
translation.other: 至少需要 {int:MinPlayers} 名玩家

translation.key: Need at least {int:MinPlayers} players
translation.other: 至少需要 {int:MinPlayers} 名玩家

translation.key: The class limit exceeded
translation.value: 已超出职业限制

translation.key: You are frozen: {sec:EffectDuration}
translation.value: 你被冻结了︰{sec:EffectDuration}

translation.key: You are slowed: {sec:EffectDuration}
translation.value: 你被减速了：{sec:EffectDuration}

translation.key: You are in Solo mode
translation.value: 你正处于单人模式

translation.key: You are in Solo mode for {sec:EffectDuration}
translation.value: 你正处于单人模式：{sec:EffectDuration}

translation.key: The target is too strong, the tranquilizer won't work
translation.value: 目标太强大，镇静无法起效

translation.key: You need at least {int:MinimumHP} HP
translation.value: 你至少需要 {int:MinimumHP} 点血或盾

translation.key: Too few infected (less than {int:MinimumInfected})
translation.value: 感染者太少了（少于 {int:MinimumInfected} 个）

translation.key: The target is too strong, the cure won't work
translation.value: 目标太强大，治疗无法起效

translation.key: Medic {str:MedicName} revived {str:RevivedName}
translation.value: 医生 {str:MedicName} 治疗了 {str:RevivedName}

translation.key: You destroyed {str:PlayerName}'s turret!
translation.value: 你摧毁了 {str:PlayerName} 的炮塔！

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} has destroyed your turret!
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 摧毁了你的炮塔！

translation.key: Taxi prevents ammo regeneration for all passengers.
translation.value: 开车会让所有乘客的弹药停止恢复。

translation.key: Choosing a random class grants full armor.
translation.value: 选择随机职业会获得满盾。

translation.key: You can toggle hook protection by pressing f3 ("Vote yes" keybind).
translation.value: 你能通过按 F3（“赞成投票”键）来切换钩子保护。

translation.key: Mercenary can reduce ammo usage during flight by tapping instead of holding down the "fire" button.
translation.value: 雇佣兵能通过连续短暂按下开火键代替长按来节省弹药。

translation.key: Mercenary's grenades prevent zombies from healing.
translation.value: 雇佣兵的榴弹会阻止感染者回血。

translation.key: Medic can heal Heroes using the grenade launcher.
translation.value: 医生能用榴弹发射器治疗英雄。

translation.key: Medic and Biologist can use hammer to instantly kill an infected.
translation.value: 医生和生物学家可以用锤子来瞬间击杀一个感染者。

translation.key: Hero can stand still for a short time to be pointed towards the flag.
translation.value: 英雄能静止不动一段时间，来获得一个指向旗子的点。

translation.key: Hero's turrets are great for detecting Ghosts.
translation.value: 英雄炮塔对于发现幽灵很有用。

translation.key: Hero's flags fully restore ammo to all humans
translation.value: 英雄旗子能回满所有人类的弹药

translation.key: Soldier's bombs can hit through walls.
translation.value: 士兵炸弹能透过墙壁造成伤害。

translation.key: Ninja's slash deals 9 damage by default. One more pistol shot will kill an infected with no armor.
translation.value: 忍者的斩击默认造成 9 点伤害。再用手枪射击一次就能击杀没有盾的感染者。

translation.key: Ninja with a single strength upgrade can kill an armorless infected with a single slash.
translation.value: 具有强度升级的忍者用一次斩击就能击杀没有盾的感染者。

translation.key: Ninja doesn't need to directly kill their target. An assist with a laser blind or grenade stun will still grant the rewards.
translation.value: 忍者不一定需要直接击杀目标。通过激光致盲或者榴弹冰冻协助队友击杀目标仍能获得奖励。

translation.key: Ninja heals slightly on a target kill.
translation.value: 忍者在击杀目标时会回一点血。

translation.key: Sniper deals double as much damage in locked position.
translation.value: 狙击手在位置锁定时会造成双倍伤害。

translation.key: Scientist can use Taxi to teleport his teammates into safety.
translation.value: 科学家能开车来把队友送到安全的地方。

translation.key: Scientist can get a white hole after {int:Kills} kill.
translation.other: 科学家能在 {int:Kills} 个击杀后获得白洞。

translation.key: Scientist can get a white hole after {int:Kills} kills.
translation.other: 科学家能在 {int:Kills} 个击杀后获得白洞。

translation.key: Scientist can rocket jump with the laser rifle.
translation.value: 科学家可以用激光枪进行榴弹跳。

translation.key: Biologist's hammer can stop poison effect on teammates. Look for heart icons.
translation.value: 生物学家的锤子能解除队友的中毒状态。注意心的图标。

translation.key: Biologist's bouncy shotgun can be used to hit the infected around corners.
translation.value: 生物学家的弹跳霰弹枪能用来攻击角落里的感染者。

translation.key: Smoker heals by hooking humans.
translation.value: 吸烟者可以通过勾人类回血。

translation.key: Boomer can infect through narrow walls.
translation.value: 爆炸者能透过窄墙造成感染。

translation.key: Hunter receives no knockback from Medic's shotgun.
translation.value: 猎人不会被医生霰弹枪击退。

translation.key: Bat can heal by hitting humans.
translation.value: 蝙蝠能通过锤人类回血。

translation.key: Spider doesn't need to be in Web mode to automatically grab any humans touching its hook.
translation.value: 蜘蛛不需要处于网状模式就能自动抓住碰到钩子的人类。

translation.key: Spider can be hooked and transported by teammates to extend its hook trap.
translation.value: 蜘蛛能被队友钩住并移动来增长它的钩子陷阱。

translation.key: Slug can heal itself and allies over time up to {int:MaxHP} HP with its slime.
translation.value: 鼻涕虫和它的队友能站在黏液里来回血（最多 {int:MaxHP} 点）。

translation.key: Slug can hold down the "fire" button to automatically spread slime. The hammer swings won't hurt humans this way though.
translation.value: 鼻涕虫能长按开火键来自动散播黏液。这种情况下锤子不会锤到人类。

translation.key: Voodoo can unfreeze an Undead while in Spirit mode.
translation.value: 巫毒者可以在灵魂状态解冻一名不死族。

translation.key: Witch can spawn the infected through narrow walls.
translation.value: 女巫能让感染者透过窄墙出生。

translation.key: Undead can be removed from a game by throwing it into kill tiles or reviving it as a Medic.
translation.value: 通过把不死族扔进刺里或者作为医生治疗它可以消灭一个不死族。

translation.key: The game is not balanced. Infection is coming.
translation.value: 游戏不平衡。感染即将到来。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} entered and joined the game
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 连接并加入游戏

translation.key: InfectionClass Mod. Version: {str:VerStr}
translation.value: InfectionClass（感染模式）Mod。版本：{str:VerStr}

translation.key: See also: /help, /changelog, /about
translation.value: 另见：/help、/changelog、/about

translation.key: Join our Discord server: {str:Url}
translation.value: 加入我们的 Discord 服务器： {str:Url}

translation.key: Join our Telegram: {str:Url}
translation.value: 加入我们的 Telegram：{str:Url}

translation.key: Join our Matrix room: {str:Url}
translation.value: 加入我们的 Matrix 房间：{str:Url}

translation.key: You have infected {str:VictimName}, shame on you!
translation.value: 你使 {str:VictimName} 被感染了，你真可耻！

translation.key: You have been infected by {str:KillerName}
translation.value: 你被 {str:KillerName} 感染了

translation.key: You have infected {str:VictimName}, +3 points
translation.value: 你感染了 {str:VictimName}，+3 分

translation.key: The Hero found the flag!
translation.value: 英雄找到了旗帜 ！

translation.key: Unable to set preferred class: Invalid class name
translation.value: 无法设置首选职业：无效的职业名称

translation.key: A random class will be automatically attributed to you when round starts
translation.value: 回合开始时会自动选择随机职业

translation.key: The class selector will be displayed when round starts
translation.value: 职业选择器会在回合开始前显示

translation.value: 回合开始时会自动选择“{str:ClassName}”职业

translation.key: The command is not available (enabled only in training mode)
translation.value: 命令不可用（仅在练习模式中启用）

translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 修改职业为 {str:ClassName}

translation.value: 无法开始有趣的回合：回合配置是空的

translation.value: 无法开始有趣的回合：已达到单张地图的最大限制

translation.value: 无法保存坐标: 你没有角色来保存位置

translation.value: 无法保存坐标: 玩家状态无效

translation.value: 无法保存坐标: 角色不在地上

translation.value: 无法加载坐标: 你没有角色来加载位置

translation.value: 无法加载坐标: 玩家状态无效

translation.key: The witch is not available in this round
translation.value: 女巫在此回合不可用

translation.key: The Santa is not available in this round
translation.value: 圣诞老人在此回合不可用

translation.key: The Santa is already here
translation.value: 圣诞老人已经在这里

translation.key: All witches are already here
translation.value: 所有女巫已经在这里了

translation.key: Too few players to call the Santa
translation.value: 玩家太少，不能召唤圣诞老人

translation.key: Too few players to call a witch
translation.value: 玩家太少，不能召唤女巫

translation.key: Too few infected to call the Santa
translation.value: 感染者太少，不能召唤圣诞老人

translation.key: Too few infected to call a witch
translation.value: 感染者太少，不能召唤女巫

translation.key: You have called the Santa once again
translation.value: 你重复呼叫了圣诞老人

translation.key: You can't call witch twice
translation.value: 你不能重复召唤女巫

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} is calling for Santa! (1/{int:RequiredCallers}) To call the Santa write: /santa
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 正在召唤圣诞老人！（1/{int:RequiredCallers}）要召唤圣诞老人输入：/witch

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} is calling for Witch! (1/{int:RequiredCallers}) To call witch write: /witch
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 正在召唤女巫！（1/{int:RequiredCallers}）要召唤女巫输入：/witch

translation.key: Santa ({int:Callers}/{int:RequiredCallers})
translation.value: 召唤圣诞老人 （{int:Callers}/{int:RequiredCallers}）

translation.key: Witch ({int:Callers}/{int:RequiredCallers})
translation.value: 召唤女巫（{int:Callers}/{int:RequiredCallers}）

translation.key: Santa {str:PlayerName} has arrived!
translation.value: 圣诞老人 {str:PlayerName} 已经到达！

translation.key: Witch {str:PlayerName} has arrived!
translation.value: 女巫 {str:PlayerName} 已经到达！

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} joined the spectators
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 加入旁观者

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} joined the game
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 加入游戏

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} got to know their bomb too closely.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 与他的炸弹亲密接触了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} rode the blast wave for the last time.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 再也没有感受冲击波的机会了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was exploded by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被 {str:Killer} 炸飞了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was eliminated by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被 {str:Killer} 消灭了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} met a boomer.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 邂逅了爆炸者。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} had no aid against {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 无力抵抗 {str:Killer}。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was electrified by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被 {str:Killer} 电焦了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} did a stretching exercise.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 做了个拉伸运动。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was torn apart.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被撕碎了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was drained by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被 {str:Killer} 吸干了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was surprised by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被 {str:Killer} 吓死了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was bitten by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被 {str:Killer} 咬了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} kinda gave up.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 选择了放弃。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} had no ammo to kill them all.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 的子弹不够把它们全部杀光。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} forgot to reload timely.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 忘了及时装弹。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was destroyed by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被 {str:Killer} 摧毁了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was slain by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 命丧 {str:Killer} 之手。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was decapitated by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:Killer} 让 {str:PlayerName} 的头摆脱了脖子的束缚。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was chopped up by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被 {str:Killer} 剁碎了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} was removed from this world by {str:Killer}.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被 {str:Killer} 从这个世界上移除了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} made a wrong step.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 踩空了。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} went where they shouldn't.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 去了不该去的地方，通往黄泉。

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} didn't survive in this round.
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 这回合没活下来。

translation.key: Play more on this map
translation.value: 继续在该地图上游玩

translation.key: The last round
translation.value: 最后一回合

translation.key: {str:VictimName} has been infected
translation.value: {str:VictimName} 被感染了

translation.key: Someone was infected to balance the game.
translation.value: 为了平衡游戏有人被感染了。

translation.key: The round canceled: All infected have left the game
translation.value: 回合取消：所有感染者离开了游戏

translation.key: The round canceled: All humans have left the game
translation.value: 回合取消：所有人类离开了游戏

translation.key: {int:NumHumans} human won the round
translation.other: {int:NumHumans} 名人类获得本轮胜利

translation.key: {int:NumHumans} humans won the round
translation.other: {int:NumHumans} 名人类获得本轮胜利

translation.key: You have survived, +5 points
translation.value: 你成功存活，+5 分

translation.key: Infected won the round in {sec:RoundDuration}
translation.value: 被感染者在本轮中获得胜利 {sec:RoundDuration}

translation.key: Infection is coming in {sec:RemainingTime}
translation.value: 感染将在 {sec:RemainingTime} 后到来

translation.key: You have to wait until the survival is over
translation.value: 你必须等到生存结束

translation.key: The survival is over. You have failed to survive a single wave.
translation.value: 生存已结束。你没能活过一波。

translation.key: The survival is over after {int:NumWaves} wave.
translation.other: 生存在 {int:NumWaves} 波后结束了。

translation.key: The survival is over after {int:NumWaves} waves.
translation.other: 生存在 {int:NumWaves} 波后结束了。

translation.key: The survival is over. You have survived!
translation.value: 生存已结束。你活下来了！

translation.key: The survival is over. You have survived the final wave!
translation.value: 生存已结束。你活过了最后一波！

translation.key: Rules of the game
translation.value: 游戏规则

translation.key: InfectionClass is a team game between humans and the infected.
translation.value: InfectionClass（感染模式）是一个人类与感染者间的团队游戏。

translation.key: All players start as a human.
translation.value: 所有玩家一开始都是人类。

translation.key: 10 seconds later, a few players become infected.
translation.value: 10 秒后，有些玩家会被感染。

translation.key: The goal for the humans is to survive until the army cleans the map.
translation.value: 人类的目标是生存到援军清理地图。

translation.key: The goal for the infected is to infect all humans.
translation.value: 感染者目标为感染所有人类。

translation.key: See also `/help pages`
translation.value: 另见：/help pages

translation.key: How to translate the mod
translation.value: 如何翻译此 mod

translation.key: Create an account on Crowdin and join the translation team:
translation.value: 在 Crowdin 上创建一个账户并加入翻译团队:

translation.key: White hole
translation.value: 白洞

translation.key: White hole pulls the infected into its center.
translation.value: 白洞把感染者拉进其中心。

translation.key: Receive it by killing at least {int:NumKills} infected as a Scientist.
translation.other: 科学家通过杀死至少 {int:NumKills} 个感染者来获得它。

translation.key: Receive it by killing at least {int:NumKills} of the infected as a Scientist.
translation.other: 科学家通过杀死至少 {int:NumKills} 个感染者来获得它。

translation.key: Use the laser rifle to place it.
translation.value: 用激光枪放置它。

translation.key: Targeted chat messages
translation.value: 有针对性的聊天消息

translation.key: Use “/w <PlayerName> <My Message>” to send a private message to this player.
translation.value: 使用 “/w <玩家名> <消息>”给这个玩家发送私聊。

translation.key: Use “/msg !<ClassName> <My Message>” to send a private message to all players with a specific class.
translation.value: 使用“/msg !<ClassName> <My Message>”给所有特定职业的玩家发送消息。

translation.key: Example: “/msg !medic I'm wounded!”
translation.value: 例如：“/msg !medic 我需要治疗！”

translation.key: Use “/msg !near” to send a private message to all players near you.
translation.value: 使用“/msg !near”给附近所有玩家发送消息。

translation.key: Persistent player mute
translation.value: 永久禁言玩家

translation.key: Use “/mute <PlayerName>” to mute this player.
translation.value: 使用 “/mute <玩家名>” 来屏蔽这个玩家的消息。

translation.key: Unlike a client mute this will persist between map changes and wears off when either you or the muted player disconnects.
translation.value: 与客户端屏蔽不同，此效果将在地图切换后持续生效，并在您或被屏蔽玩家断开连接时失效。

translation.key: Example: “/mute nameless tee”
translation.value: 例如: "/mute nameless tee"

translation.key: How to use taxi mode
translation.value: 如何开车

translation.key: Two or more humans can form a taxi.
translation.value: 两个或更多的人类可以组成一辆车。

translation.key: In order to use it, both humans have to disable hook protection (usually, with F3). The human being hooked becomes the driver.
translation.value: 为了开车，两个人都必须取消钩子保护（一般按 F3），然后被勾的人将成为司机。

translation.key: To get off the taxi, jump. To drop off your passengers, enable hook protection (usually, with F3).
translation.value: 若要离开车，请跳跃。要从乘客身上下来，可启用钩子保护（通常使用 F3）。

translation.key: Fast round
translation.value: 极速回合

translation.key: In the fast rounds *more* humans become infected initially, the spawning rate is increased and the round time limit is decreased. White hole is also disabled.
translation.value: 在快速回合里，更多的人类会被感染，重生速度会增加，回合时间缩短。白洞被禁用。

translation.key: The Mercenary can fly in the air using their machine gun.
translation.value: 雇佣兵可以用手枪飞行。

translation.key: They can also create a powerful bomb with their hammer that can be charged by hitting it or with a laser rifle.
translation.value: 他可以用锤子制造强大的炸弹。用锤子或者激光枪可以给炸弹充能。

translation.key: Mercenary can also throw poison grenades that deal {int:NumDamagePoints} damage point and prevent the infected from healing.
translation.other: 雇佣兵可以发射毒气弹，使感染者中毒，造成 {int:NumDamagePoints} 点伤害并阻止感染者回血。

translation.key: Mercenary can also throw poison grenades that deal {int:NumDamagePoints} damage points and prevent the infected from healing.
translation.other: 雇佣兵可以发射毒气弹，使感染者中毒，造成 {int:NumDamagePoints} 点伤害并阻止感染者回血。

translation.key: The Medic can protect humans with the hammer by giving them armor.
translation.value: 医生可以用他的锤子为其他人类增加盾。

translation.key: Grenades with medicine give armor to everybody in their range, including Heroes and the Medic themself.
translation.value: 医生的榴弹可以给在范围里的每个人盾，包括英雄和医生自己。

translation.key: Tranqulizer rifle makes the infected fall asleep for {sec:Duration}.
translation.value: 镇静激光让感染者陷入 {sec:Duration} 沉眠。

translation.key: Laser rifle revives the infected, but at the cost of 17 hp and armor.
translation.value: 激光枪可以治疗感染者，但需要 17 生命或护甲。

translation.key: Medic also has a powerful shotgun that can knock back the infected.
translation.value: 医生的霰弹枪可以击退感染者。

translation.key: The Hero has all standard weapons.
translation.value: 英雄拥有所有标准武器。

translation.key: The Hero has to find a flag only visible to them. Stand still to be pointed towards it.
translation.value: 英雄需要找到只有他可见的旗子。静止不动一段时间，来获得一个指向旗子的点。

translation.key: The flag gifts a health point, {int:NumArmorGift} armor and full ammo to all humans.
translation.value: 旗帜会给所有人类一颗心，{int:NumArmorGift} 点盾，并回满弹药。

translation.key: It fully heals the Hero and it can grant a turret which you can place down with the hammer.
translation.value: 它会回满英雄的血，并使英雄得到一个可用锤子放置的炮塔。

translation.key: The gift to all humans is only applied when the flag is surrounded by hearts and armor.
translation.value: 只有被心和盾包裹的旗帜，才可以为所有人类加成。

translation.key: The Hero cannot be healed by a Medic, but it can withstand a hit from an infected.
translation.value: 英雄不能被医生治疗，但是可以承受一次感染者的攻击而不死。

translation.key: The Engineer can build walls with the hammer to block the infected.
translation.value: 工程师可以用锤子创建激光墙，阻挡被感染者。

translation.key: When an infected touches the wall, it dies.
translation.value: 当感染者碰到激光墙时， 它会死亡。

translation.key: The lifespan of a wall is {sec:LifeSpan}, and walls are limited to one per player at the same time.
translation.value: 激光墙可以存在 {sec:LifeSpan}，每个玩家同时只能拥有一个激光墙。

translation.key: The Soldier creates floating bombs with the hammer.
translation.value: 士兵可以用锤子放置炸弹。

translation.key: Each bomb can explode {int:NumBombs} time.
translation.other: 炸弹可以爆炸 {int:NumBombs} 次。

translation.key: Each bomb can explode {int:NumBombs} times.
translation.other: 炸弹可以爆炸 {int:NumBombs} 次。

translation.key: Use the hammer to place the bomb and explode it multiple times.
translation.value: 用锤子放置炸弹并引爆它数次。

translation.key: The Ninja can throw flash grenades that can freeze the infected for three seconds.
translation.value: 忍者可以用闪光榴弹冻结感染者 3 秒。

translation.key: Their hammer is replaced with a katana, allowing them to dash {int:NinjaJump} time before touching the ground.
translation.other: 他的锤子被武士刀取代，允许他触地后冲刺 {int:NinjaJump} 次。

translation.key: Their hammer is replaced with a katana, allowing them to dash {int:NinjaJump} times before touching the ground.
translation.other: 他的锤子被武士刀取代，允许他触地后冲刺 {int:NinjaJump} 次。

translation.key: They also have a laser rifle that blinds the target for a short period of time.
translation.value: 他们还有一把激光枪，可短时间内使目标失明。

translation.key: Ninja gets special targets. For killing a target, extra points and abilities are awarded.
translation.value: 忍者会得到特殊的目标。当他杀死目标，会获得升级和额外的分数。

translation.key: The Sniper can lock the position in mid-air for 15 seconds with the hammer.
translation.value: 狙击手可以用锤子在空中锁定自己位置15秒。

translation.key: The locked position increases the Sniper's rifle damage from usual 10-13 to 30 damage points.
translation.value: 位置锁定将狙击手的激光枪伤害从通常的 10-13 点增加到 20 点。

translation.key: They can also jump two times in the air.
translation.value: 他可以三段跳。

translation.key: The Scientist can pose floating mines with the hammer.
translation.value: 科学家可以用锤子放置地雷。

translation.key: Mines are limited to {int:NumMines} per player at the same time.
translation.other: 每个玩家同时可放置最多 {int:NumMines} 个地雷。

translation.key: Mines are limited to {int:NumMines} per player at the same time.
translation.other: 每个玩家同时可放置最多 {int:NumMines} 个地雷。

translation.key: Scientist has also grenades that teleport them.
translation.value: 科学家有用于瞬移的榴弹枪。

translation.key: A lucky Scientist devoted to killing can get a white hole that sucks the infected in which can be placed with the laser rifle.
translation.value: 幸运的科学家会在杀死感染者时得到白洞，白洞可用激光枪放置，会吸住感染者。

translation.key: The Biologist has a shotgun with bouncing bullets and can create a spring laser trap by shooting with the laser rifle.
translation.value: 生物学家可以用霰弹枪射出跳弹，也可以用激光枪设置激光陷阱。

translation.key: They are also immune to continuous poison effect, and can stop it on teammates with the Hammer.
translation.value: 他们不会受到持续的毒伤害，并且能用锤子解除队友的中毒状态。

translation.key: The Looper has a laser wall that slows down the infected and a low-range laser rifle with a high fire rate.
translation.value: 循环者有激光墙，可以减慢感染者的速度，还有一支射速高的低射程激光枪。

translation.key: They can also jump two times in the air.
translation.value: 他可以三段跳。

translation.key: Smoker has a powerful hook that hurts humans and sucks their blood, restoring the Smoker's health.
translation.value: 吸烟者有一个强大的钩子，通过伤害人类，来恢复吸烟者的血量。

translation.key: It can also infect humans and heal the infected with the hammer.
translation.value: 它可以用锤子感染人类或治疗感染者。

translation.key: The Boomer explodes when it attacks.
translation.value: 爆炸者在攻击的时候会自爆。

translation.key: All humans affected by the explosion become infected.
translation.value: 人类会被爆炸感染。

translation.key: It can also inflict 1 damage point per second by hooking humans.
translation.value: 它可以勾住人类，每秒造成 1 点伤害。

translation.key: The Hunter can jump two times in the air and has some resistance to knock-backs.
translation.value: 猎人可以三段跳，并且有击退抗性。

translation.key: It can infect humans and heal the infected with the hammer.
translation.value: 它可以用锤子感染人类或治疗感染者。

translation.key: It can also inflict 1 damage point per second by hooking humans.
translation.value: 它可以勾住人类，每秒造成 1 点伤害。

translation.key: Bat can jump endlessly in the air but it cannot infect humans.
translation.value: 蝙蝠能够在空中无限跳跃，但是不能直接感染人类。

translation.key: Instead, it can hammer humans to steal their health and heal itself.
translation.value: 相反，它可以锤人类来窃取人类的血量并且回血。

translation.key: The hammer is also useful for healing the infected.
translation.value: 锤子可以治疗感染者。

translation.key: It can also inflict 1 damage point per second by hooking humans.
translation.value: 它可以勾住人类，每秒造成 1 点伤害。

translation.key: The Ghost is invisible until a human comes nearby, it takes damage, or it uses the hammer.
translation.value: 幽灵在旁边无人类时会隐形，除非受到伤害或者使用锤子。

translation.key: It can infect humans and heal the infected with the hammer.
translation.value: 它可以用锤子感染人类或治疗感染者。

translation.key: It can also inflict 1 damage point per second by hooking humans.
translation.value: 它可以勾住人类，每秒造成 1 点伤害。

translation.key: The Spider has a web hook that automatically grabs any human touching it.
translation.value: 蜘蛛有网状钩子，可以抓住碰到钩子的人类。

translation.key: The web hook mode can be toggled by switching the weapon.
translation.value: 通过切换武器可以切换钩子模式。

translation.key: In both modes the hook inflicts 1 damage point per second and can grab a human for longer.
translation.value: 在两种模式里钩子都可以给人类每秒造成 1 点伤害，并且可长时间勾住人类。

translation.key: The Ghoul can devour anything that has died nearby, which makes it stronger, faster and more resistant.
translation.value: 食尸鬼可以吞食它附近已经死亡的感染者，使它更快，更壮，更强。

translation.key: It digests the fodder over time, going back to the normal state. Some nourishment is also lost on death.
translation.value: 它会逐渐消耗饱食度直到回到初始状态，死亡会失去部分饱食度。

translation.key: Ghoul can infect humans and heal the infected with the hammer.
translation.value: 食尸鬼可以用锤子感染人类或治疗感染者。

translation.key: It can also inflict 1 damage point per second by hooking humans.
translation.value: 它可以勾住人类，每秒造成 1 点伤害。

translation.key: The Slug can make the ground and walls toxic by spreading slime with the hammer.
translation.value: 鼻涕虫可以用锤子向地面和墙壁散播粘液，让它们变得有毒。

translation.key: The slime heals the infected and deals damage to humans.
translation.value: 粘液会治疗感染者并对人类造成伤害。

translation.key: Slug can infect humans and heal the infected with the hammer.
translation.value: 鼻涕虫可以用锤子感染人类或治疗感染。

translation.key: It can also inflict 1 damage point per second by hooking humans.
translation.value: 它可以勾住人类，每秒造成 1 点伤害。

translation.key: The Voodoo does not die immediately when killed but instead enters Spirit mode for a short time.
translation.value: 巫毒者不会在被杀死时立刻死亡，而是进入短暂的灵魂状态。

translation.key: While in Spirit mode it cannot be killed. When the time is up it finally dies.
translation.value: 在灵魂状态下无法被击杀。当时间结束它才会死亡。

translation.key: Voodoo can infect humans and heal the infected with the hammer.
translation.value: 巫毒者可以用锤子感染人类或治疗感染者。

translation.key: It can also inflict 1 damage point per second by hooking humans.
translation.value: 它可以勾住人类，每秒造成 1 点伤害。

translation.key: The Witch can provide a spawn point for the infected.
translation.value: 女巫可以为感染者提供一个出生点。

translation.key: If the Witch dies, it disappears and is replaced by another class.
translation.value: 如果女巫死了，它会消失并转变职业。

translation.key: Witch can infect humans and heal the infected with the hammer.
translation.value: 女巫可以用锤子感染人类或治疗感染者。

translation.key: It can also inflict 1 damage point per second by hooking humans.
translation.value: 它可以勾住人类，每秒造成 1 点伤害。

translation.key: The Undead cannot die. Instead of dying, it gets frozen for 10 seconds.
translation.value: 不死族不会死亡，而是被冻结 10 秒。

translation.key: If an infected heals it, the freeze effect disappears.
translation.value: 如果一个感染者锤它，冻结效果会消失。

translation.key: Undead can infect humans and heal the infected with the hammer.
translation.value: 不死族可以用锤子感染人类或治疗感染。

translation.key: It can also inflict 1 damage point per second by hooking humans.
translation.value: 它可以勾住人类，每秒造成 1 点伤害。

translation.key: You have killed a witch, +5 points
translation.value: 你杀了一个女巫，+5 分

translation.key: You have killed an undead! +5 points
translation.value: 你杀了一个不死族，+5 分

translation.key: The witch is dead
translation.value: 女巫已死

translation.key: The undead is finally dead
translation.value: 不死族最终还是死了

translation.key: Self kill attempt prevented. Trigger self kill again to confirm.
translation.value: 自杀被阻止。再次自杀以确认。

translation.key: Hook protection enabled
translation.value: 钩子保护开启

translation.key: Hook protection disabled
translation.value: 钩子保护关闭

translation.key: You are a human: {str:ClassName}
translation.value: 你处于正常状态： {str:ClassName}

translation.key: You are an infected: {str:ClassName}
translation.value: 你被感染了：{str:ClassName}

translation.key: Type “/help {str:ClassName}” for more information about your class
translation.value: 键入“/help {str:ClassName}”获取当前职业的更多信息

translation.key: Starting vote '{str:Desc}'
translation.value: 正在开始投票 “{str:Desc}”

translation.key: Vote passed
translation.value: 投票通过

translation.key: Vote failed
translation.value: 投票否决

translation.key: This server has an initial chat delay, you will need to wait {int:Sec} seconds before talking.
translation.value: 此服务器设置了初始聊天延迟，你在 {int:Sec} 秒后才能进行聊天。

translation.key: Invalid client id to kick
translation.value: 被踢出的客户端 ID 无效

translation.key: You can't kick yourself
translation.value: 你不能踢出你自己

translation.key: Unable to kick a server-side bot
translation.value: 无法踢出服务端机器人

translation.key: You can't kick admins
translation.value: 你不能踢出管理员

translation.key: '{str:CallerName}' called for vote to kick you
translation.value: “{str:CallerName}” 想要发起投票踢出你

translation.key: Spectators aren't allowed to start a vote.
translation.value: 旁观者不被允许开始投票。

translation.key: Invalid option
translation.value: 无效的选项

translation.key: Server is already on map {str:MapName}
translation.value: 服务器的地图已经是 {str:MapName} 了

translation.key: Each map must be played at least {int:Rounds} rounds before calling a map vote
translation.value: 每个地图必需玩至少  {int:Rounds} 回合才能投票换图

translation.key: '{str:CallerName}' called vote to change server option '{str:VoteName}' ({str:Reason})
translation.value: “{str:CallerName}” 发起投票更改服务器选项 “{str:VoteName}”（{str:Reason}）

translation.key: Votes are only allowed when the round start.
translation.value: 投票只在回合开始前允许。

translation.key: '{str:VoteName}' isn't an option on this server
translation.value: “{str:VoteName}” 不是服务器选项

translation.key: '{str:CallerName}' called vote to change server option '{str:VoteName}'
translation.value: “{str:CallerName}” 发起投票更改服务器选项 “{str:VoteName}”

translation.key: Server does not allow voting to move players to spectators
translation.value: 服务器不允许移动玩家到旁观位

translation.key: Invalid client id to move
translation.value: 无效的客户端 ID

translation.key: You can't move yourself
translation.value: 你不能将你自己移动到旁观位

translation.key: Unable to move a server-side bot to spectators
translation.value: 无法将服务端机器人移动到旁观位

translation.key: '{str:CallerName}' called for vote to move '{str:SpectateName}' to spectators ({str:Reason})
translation.value: “{str:CallerName}” 发起投票将 “{str:SpectateName}” 移动到旁观位（{str:Reason}）

translation.key: You can't join the spectators right now
translation.value: 你现在还不能进入旁观模式

translation.key: Invalid spectator id used
translation.value: 无效的旁观者 ID

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} changed their name to {str:NewName}
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 已改名为 {str:NewName}

translation.key: Switch language to {str:LangName}?
translation.value: 切换语言到{str:LangName}吗？

translation.key: You can change the language of this mod using the command /language.
translation.value: 你可以使用命令 /language 切换此 mod 的语言。

translation.key: If your language is not available, you can help with translation (/help translate).
translation.value: 如果您的语言还不可用，您可以帮助翻译（详见 /help translate）。

translation.key: You will now see all tees on this server, no matter the distance
translation.value: 你现在能看到服务器上的所有 Tee，无论距离

translation.key: You will no longer see all tees on this server
translation.value: 你不再能看到服务器上的所有 Tee

translation.key: All players were moved to the {str:TeamName}
translation.value: 所有玩家被移动到了 {str:TeamName}

translation.key: authorized player forced server option '{str:VoteName}' ({str:Reason})
translation.value: 已认证的玩家强制更改了服务器选项 “{str:VoteName}”（{str:Reason}）

translation.key: '{str:PlayerName}' was moved to spectator ({str:Reason})
translation.value: “{str:PlayerName}”  被移动到了旁观位（{str:Reason}）

translation.key: admin forced vote {str:VoteName}
translation.value: 管理员进行了强制投票 {str:VoteName}

translation.key: InfectionClass, by necropotame (version {str:VersionCode})
translation.value: InfectionClass（感染模式），作者： necropotame（版本 {str:VersionCode}）

translation.key: Based on the concept of Infection mod by Gravity
translation.value: 基于 Gravity 所做的原始感染模式（Infection）mod

translation.key: Main contributors: {str:ListOfContributors}
translation.value: 主要贡献者︰{str:ListOfContributors}

translation.key: Thanks to {str:ListOfContributors}
translation.value: 感谢 {str:ListOfContributors}

translation.key: Server version from {str:ServerCompileDate}
translation.value: 服务器构建日期：{str:ServerCompileDate}

translation.key: Sources: {str:SourceUrl}
translation.value: 源代码：{str:SourceUrl}

translation.key: Discord: {str:Url}
translation.value: Discord：{str:Url}

translation.key: Telegram: {str:Url}
translation.value: Telegram：{str:Url}

translation.key: Matrix room: {str:Url}
translation.value: Matrix 房间: {str:Url}

translation.key: Translation project: {str:Url}
translation.value: 翻译项目：{str:Url}

translation.key: See also: /credits
translation.value: 另见：/credits

translation.key: Usage: /msg <username or group> <message>
translation.value: 使用方法：/msg <玩家或群组名> <内容>

translation.key: Send a private message to a player or a group of players
translation.value: 向一名玩家或玩家群组发送私信

translation.key: Available groups: !near, !engineer, !soldier, ...
translation.value: 可用的群组：!near、!engineer、!soldier……

translation.key: No player was found with this name
translation.value: 没有找到这个名字的玩家

translation.key: Invalid player name
translation.value: 无效的玩家名

translation.key: No player with name "{str:PlayerName}" found
translation.value: 没有找到叫 “{str:PlayerName}” 的玩家

translation.key: Player muted. Mute will persist until you or the muted player disconnects.
translation.value: 已屏蔽玩家。屏蔽将持续到你或者被屏蔽的玩家断开连接。

translation.key: Player unmuted. You can see their messages again.
translation.value: 已解除屏蔽玩家。你能看到他们的消息了。

translation.key: Choose a help page with /help <page>
translation.value: 使用 /help <page> 查看帮助页

translation.key: Available help pages: {str:PageList}
translation.value: 可用的帮助页面︰{str:PageList}

translation.key: Unknown language
translation.value: 未知语言

translation.key: Available languages: {str:ListOfLanguage}
translation.value: 可用语言︰ {str:ListOfLanguage}

translation.key: List of commands
translation.value: 命令列表

translation.key: Press <F3> or <F4> to enable or disable hook protection
translation.value: 按 <F3> 或 <F4> 来启用或禁用钩子保护

translation.key: ChangeLog is not provided
translation.value: 无更改日志

translation.key: ChangeLog page {int:PageNumber} is not available
translation.value: 不能查看第 {int:PageNumber} 页更改日志

translation.key: (page {int:PageNumber}/{int:PagesInTotal}, see /changelog {int:NextPage})
translation.value: ({int:PageNumber}/{int:PagesInTotal}， 下一页查看 /changelog {int:NextPage})

translation.key: You are muted for {sec:Duration}
translation.value: 你被禁言了 {sec:Duration}

translation.key: Invalid whisper
translation.value: 无效的私信

translation.key: You do not have an ongoing conversation. Whisper to someone to start one
translation.value: 你没有正在进行的对话。向某人发送私信来开始一个

translation.key: You can only vote after logging in.
translation.value: 你需要登录才能投票。

translation.key: Wait for current vote to end before calling a new one.
translation.value: 当前投票结束才能开始新投票。

translation.key: You must wait {int:TimeLeftSeconds} seconds before making another vote.
translation.value: 你需要等 {int:TimeLeftSeconds}  秒才能开始另一个投票。

translation.key: There's a {int:Delay} second delay between map-votes, please wait {int:WaitTime} seconds.
translation.value: 在换图投票之间有 {int:Delay} 秒的间隔，请等 {int:WaitTime} 秒。

translation.key: Warning: {sec:RemainingTime} until a move to spec for inactivity
translation.value: 警告：将在 {sec:RemainingTime} 后因挂机移动到旁观

translation.key: Warning: {sec:RemainingTime} until a kick for inactivity
translation.value: 警告：将在 {sec:RemainingTime} 后因挂机被踢出

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} has been banned ({str:Reason})
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被封禁了（{str:Reason}）

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} has been kicked ({str:Reason})
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 被踢出了服务器（{str:Reason}）

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} has left the game ({str:Reason})
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 离开游戏（{str:Reason}）

translation.key: {str:PlayerName} has left the game
translation.value: {str:PlayerName} 离开游戏
